subcodes.first_line: The purpose of the victory that hath been mentioned in all the Tablets hath been clear to the loved ones of God, exalted be His remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مقصود از نصرتیکه در جمیع الواح ذکر شده معلوم احباء الله بوده که حق جل ذکره
subcodes.subjects: @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual transformation, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
